compiled_state.title: [pre-commit-enforcement-boundary-check]: REPO_ROOT defined -> never referenced in script body
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: REPO_ROOT is defined via 'git rev-parse --show-toplevel' but never referenced in the script body. All git commands run without this variable. Pre-commit hooks are invoked from the repo root by git so this is safe but dead code.
File: plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-enforcement-boundary-check.sh
Category: hygiene

comments.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Confirmed unused. REPO_ROOT defined on line 20 of plugins/dso/hooks/pre-commit-enforcement-boundary-check.sh but never referenced — script uses git diff --cached and git show directly. Dead code, safe to delete. DEFERRED: requires user approval (CLAUDE.md rule 22 — pre-commit hook file).
comments.author: Test

comments.body: USER_APPROVAL: User approved safeguard file edits for this ticket (2026-04-19). Full fix-bug TDD process required.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral (safeguard hook file, dead code hygiene finding). Score: 0 (BASIC). CLI_user tag absent but USER_APPROVAL for safeguard edits recorded on 2026-04-19.
